prompt: Create a cinematic dark fantasy landscape in a wide 16:9 aspect ratio. The scene shows a solitary ancient twisted tree on the right foreground, its gnarled black trunk spiraling upward into a dramatic loop like a heart or ring, with sparse thorny branches silhouetted against a blood-red sky. Place the tree on a jagged volcanic ridge of black rock with glowing red lava cracks. In the midground and background, show a vast hostile wasteland with exactly 7 visible mountain peaks or peak clusters: one dominant sharp black mountain mass on the left, one narrow glowing spire just right of it, three smaller triangular peaks near the center horizon, and two faint distant peaks on the far right. Add low red fog and smoke drifting through the valleys, with glowing lava rivers snaking across the lower left and center ground. The sky should be intense crimson and black, filled with layered storm clouds, faint stars, and a blazing red-orange horizon glow. Use a limited palette of deep red, black, crimson, and ember orange, high contrast, dramatic rim lighting, ultra-detailed textures, epic scale, realistic fantasy concept art, no characters, no buildings, no text, no watermark. Emphasize the mood as ominous, apocalyptic, and romantic and make the focal subject a twisted heart-shaped dead tree in a volcanic wasteland at red dusk.
